GM:(0,0,0)  M:(1,1,1)  N:(1/2,0,1/2)  NA:(0,1/2,-1/2)  P:(1/2,1/2,1/2)  PA:(1/2,1/2,-1/2)  X:(1/2,1/2,0)
GM:(0,0,0)  X:(1,1,1)  R:(1/2,0,1/2)  S:(0,1/2,1/2)  W:(1/2,1/2,1/2)  WA:(-1/2,-1/2,-1/2)  T:(1/2,1/2,0)
GM1  GM2  GM3GM4  GM5  (M)X1  (M)X2  (M)X3X4  (M)X5  (N)R1  (N)R2  (N)R3  (N)R4  (NA)S1  (NA)S2  (NA)S3  (NA)S4  (P)W1  (P)W2  (P)W3  (P)W4  (P)W5  (PA)WA1  (PA)WA2  (PA)WA3  (PA)WA4  (PA)WA5  (X)T1  (X)T2  (X)T3  (X)T4
